title: Indonesia submits Second NDC ahead of COP30 — first economy-wide absolute target
body: Indonesia's SNDC (Oct 2025) introduces an economy-wide absolute GHG target for the first time: 1.49 GtCO2e unconditionally and 1.35 GtCO2e conditionally by 2030 (2019 baseline). Salt marshes added alongside mangroves and seagrass.

title: Blue Carbon Ecosystems Roadmap & RENAKSI 2025–2030 launched at COP30
body: Indonesia's Ministry of Environment and MMAF launched the Blue Carbon Ecosystems Roadmap and Action Guide at COP30 in Belém. The RENAKSI national action plan covers mangroves (3.45M ha), seagrass (660K ha), and newly recognised salt marshes.

title: IDXCarbon opens international tier — five PLN power plants list 1.78 MtCO2e
body: Indonesia launched international carbon trading on IDXCarbon in January 2025 with five PLN power-plant SPE-GRK units. International-tier prices ranged from $5.90/t (gas-fired) to $7.01/t (mini-hydro).

title: IDXCarbon trading volume drops 98.5% in June 2025
body: IDXCarbon domestic trading volume fell 98.5% month-on-month in June 2025. Market observers cite limited buyer demand and uncertainty around the new PR 110/2025 NEK framework. Cumulative traded volume stands at 1.60 MtCO2e since September 2023.

title: PR 110/2025 enacted — replaces PR 98/2021 with NEK framework
body: Presidential Regulation 110/2025 on the Economic Value of Carbon (NEK) supersedes PR 98/2021. It formalises the Carbon Actual mechanism, ITMO authorisation procedure, and sets carbon allocation ceilings for 2026–2030.

title: Verra–SRN MRA aligns Indonesian carbon market with international standards
body: A Mutual Recognition Agreement between Verra (VCS) and Indonesia's SRN registry was signed in September 2024, allowing Verra-issued credits to be recognised within the national carbon market without double registration.
